highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.

5978 was support (we set big lows here on June 5th, June 12th, then put in 10 point Failed Breakdowns on June 19th and this Sunday), with resistance being up at 6081 (declining trendline connecting the June 11th and June 16h lower highs).
To do that, we need a setup, and for me, its always the Failed Breakdown.
Where do Failed Breakdowns most often occur?
” I also wrote on Friday at 4pm: “…Wait for a Failed Breakdown of Thursdays 5970 low.
5978-82 to 6081= a range (descending triangle) with 6050 a key magnet inside.

post_title: Yesterday SPX Broke Out Its 2 Week Range. All Time Highs Next, Or Pullback? June 26th
